overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a coastal highway at dusk. The character moves along the road past vehicles, stops to overlook the ocean and a stone bridge, then continues walking as the sun sets behind the mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with rocky cliffs on left

events.description: black sedan passes by on the right side of the highway
large semi-truck passes by on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder next to a steep rocky cliff face

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the highway
large semi-truck driving past on the highway

entered.detail: steep rocky mountain face running parallel to the highway
metal guardrail separating the road from the coastal drop-off
tall street lights lining the highway
utility poles with power lines running along the road
tall mountain visible in the distance against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a coastal highway during dusk, with a steep rocky cliff on the left and a guardrail on the right. Vehicles including a black sedan and a semi-truck pass by on the road as street lights and power lines recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff overlook with panoramic ocean view

events.description: character moves from the highway to the cliff edge to view the ocean
camera pans left to reveal the stone coastal bridge and beach below

agents.ego_description: standing at the cliff edge, looking out over the ocean and down at the coastal scenery below

entered.detail: expansive ocean with calm waters stretching to the horizon
rock formations and sea stacks rising from the ocean water
large stone arch bridge spanning the coastal inlet
sandy beach visible at the water's edge below the cliff

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the road, the character stands at the cliff edge overlooking a vast ocean with rocky islands scattered across the water. The camera pans to reveal a large stone arch bridge spanning the inlet below, with a sandy beach visible at the shoreline.

events.description: character returns to the highway from the cliff overlook
red semi-truck approaches and passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder with vehicles passing by, approaching the stone bridge structure

notable_agents.action: red semi-truck driving past on the highway

entered.detail: metal guardrail now visible on the left side of the road
pine trees lining the highway near the bridge approach

segments.scene_description: Returning to the highway, the character continues walking along the road as the sun sits low on the horizon. The stone bridge is now visible on the left side of the road, while various vehicles including a red semi-truck pass by on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a coastal highway at dusk that shifts from a roadside perspective to a sweeping oceanic vista and back. It begins with the camera moving past a black sedan and a semi-truck, flanked by a steep rocky cliff and a receding line of street lights. As the character moves away from the pavement, the view opens up to a vast ocean dotted with rocky islands, panning to reveal a large stone arch bridge spanning a sandy shoreline below. The scene then shifts back toward the highway, where the camera continues forward as the sun sinks lower on the horizon. Finally, the perspective settles back onto the road, passing a red semi-truck with the stone bridge now visible to the left.
